name: ValuePacket Batch Payer
description: Automated agent that opens $0.25 USDC payment channels to early ValuePacket participants. Each recipient receives an EAS attestation proving they used the protocol. Channels are claimable by the recipient via any ValuePacket-compatible wallet.
endpoint: on-chain only — channels are opened directly on Base Sepolia

schema.output: Payment channel ID with $0.25 USDC deposited, plus EAS attestation rating
